LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE DEC-01-2021 HEARING RE: PETITIONERS STEPHEN SAMARAS AND ANNA SAMARAS' PETITION TO CONFIRM, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE PARTIES' "STIPULATION FOR CONFIRMATION OF INSURANCE APPRAISAL AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT THEREON, ORDER CONFIRMING AWARD" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm
Off Calendar Dec-01-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. E. KENNETH PURVIANCE, Esq. of Hughes & Nunn LLP (Tel: 619-231-1661) for respondent State Farm General Insurance Company;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONERS STEPHEN SAMARAS and ANNA SAMARAS' Petition To Confirm.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The parties' "stipulation for confirmation of insurance appraisal award and for entry of judgment thereon, order confirming award" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
